title: Pots and Pans Set Non Stick, 11 Piece Die-Cast Induction Hob Pan Set, Ceramic Cookware Set Nonstick Cooking Sets with Frying Pans, Saucepan Set, 100% PFOA Free, Cream
features: 【Nonstick Ceramic Cookware】M MELENTA pots and pans set feature long-lasting ceramic nonstick coating, makes cooking more enjoyable and easier. EUROFIN approved, 100% free of PTFE/ PFOA/lead/cadmium. Perfect non stick pot and pan set combines versatile cooking options with a commitment to health

【11 Piece Cookware Set】We offer high quality non stick pots and pan set without assembly: 8" & 9.5" non stick frying pans, 2 saucepan set: 1.5 QT sauce pan with lid & 2 QT saucepan with lid, 3 QT dutch oven pot with lid, 3 kitchen utensils set. Enjoy healthier and easier cooking with M MELENTA ceramic pots and pans set nonstick

【Premium Cooking Pan Set】M MELENTA induction cookware sets is aesthetically made for everyday cooking. Nonstick white granite outside and ceram ceramic interior coating is attractive yet functional. Smooth ceramic pan surface provides an effortless food release, requiring minimal oil for healthier cooking. Pot set comes with elegant gift boxes which is a perfect gift for your family and friends

【Stay Cool Bakelite Handles】M MELENTA induction hob pan set is equipped with comfortable bakelite handles, featuring non-slip, heat-resistant and easy-to-grip. Durable glass lids with steam vent for a clear view on food while cooking. Clean up is quick & easy, you only need to rinse or wipe with a damp paper towel

【Quick & Even Heating】This nonstick cookware set is crafted from sturdy heavy-duty aluminum, heats up quickly and evenly. Low or medium heat is recommended while cooking. High magnetic conductive steel base allows this pot sets for cooking nonstick compatible with all stovetops including induction
description: Product Description M MELENTA Pots and Pans Set Nonstick - Utility Meets Elegance Enjoy hassle-free cooking for everyday meals with M MELENTA pots and pan set nonstick Pots and Pans Set Non Stick Excellent Non Stick Performance Nonstick smooth ceramic surface provides an effortless food release. Super Easy to Clean Simply Wipe to Clean Nonstick pots and pans finished with an enhanced ceramic interior make cleaning a breeze User-friendly Design Lightweight for Easy Cooking This nonstick cookware set is lightweight construction, easy to handle and maneuver. The user-friendly design is particularly beneficial for individuals who may find heavier cookware challenging. For All cooktops Compatible with All Stovetops High magnetic conductive steel base is compatible with all cooktops including induction, gas, electric, ceramic and so on. Designed for your health, this nonstick ceramic cookware set is non toxic for safe cooking.
